seoTitle: How to Cancel a Pending Payment on PayPal (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to cancel an unclaimed pending PayPal payment before it's accepted, and what to do if the Cancel option isn't available.
intro: Sent money to the wrong email or an unverified account? As long as the payment is still unclaimed, PayPal lets you cancel it and get the funds back before it's accepted. This guide shows how to find and cancel a pending transaction. It's for anyone who's made a sending mistake and wants to reverse it quickly.

steps.heading: Open your Activity feed
steps.body: Log in and click Activity to review your recent outgoing transactions.

steps.heading: Find the pending transaction
steps.body: Locate the outgoing payment marked Pending or Unclaimed.

steps.heading: Open the transaction details
steps.body: Click the row to expand the details window and check for a Cancel link under the recipient's name.

steps.heading: Click Cancel
steps.body: Select Cancel to start the reversal, then confirm on the following screen by clicking Cancel Payment.

steps.heading: Verify the refund
steps.body: Check your dashboard for the updated Canceled status badge and confirm the funds returned to your original funding source.

faq.question: Can I cancel a payment that's already been accepted?
faq.answer: No, once a recipient accepts a payment it's considered complete and can't be canceled through this method.

faq.question: Why doesn't my transaction show a Cancel option?
faq.answer: The Cancel option only appears for eligible pending or unclaimed transfers, not completed or claimed ones.

faq.question: How long does it take for canceled funds to return?
faq.answer: Funds typically return to your original funding source shortly after the cancellation is confirmed.

faq.question: Is there a fee to cancel a pending payment?
faq.answer: No, canceling an eligible pending payment doesn't carry an additional fee.
